title: Morena Heat Wave
lead: A critical heat wave is affecting Morena with a Z-Score of +3.71. The Score is 10.0/10, indicating extreme conditions.
body:
The current weather conditions in Morena are characterized by high temperatures, with a CDD of 12.0 GG. 
 The relative humidity is at 50%, and the wind speed is 3.1 km/h, exacerbating the heat. 
 The HDD is 0.0 GG, indicating no heating degree days, while the CDD is significantly high, contributing to the critical level of the heat wave.
conclusion: Activate emergency protocols to mitigate the effects of the heat wave in Morena.
